review_binding_obligation.title: Review DPA liability, transfer & governing-law clauses
review_binding_obligation.description: Review the Project Atlas Data Processing Agreement against the firm standard. Binding obligations — liability cap, international data transfer, governing law.
review_binding_obligation.input_brief_slice: Project Atlas: supplier processes customer personal data, including US-based affiliates.

review_governing_law.title: Review governing-law & jurisdiction clause
review_governing_law.description: Review the governing-law/jurisdiction clause. Hybrid: associate owns the result and uses the AI review as a first pass.
review_governing_law.input_brief_slice: Project Atlas: cross-border agreement; jurisdiction must be defensible.
review_governing_law.ai_instruction: Run a first-pass review of clause 11 against the firm standard and surface any authority that does not support the drafting. The associate signs off.

review_recital_summary.title: Summarise background recital
review_recital_summary.description: Summarise the non-operative background recital. No binding obligation.

confidentiality_clause_review.title: Review confidentiality clause
confidentiality_clause_review.description: Confirm the confidentiality clause matches the firm standard. Assigned to a human associate.
